decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id route_b46-local-limited-20110915 exactly matches an existing registry record that already includes the source 2011_09_15_sbs_utica_cb8_9_17 in its source_ids. The record's payload (route_type: 'local and limited-stop', borough: 'Brooklyn', route_id: 'B46') matches the observation payload. The observation already resolves to its own canonical record; no link to a different record is needed.

evidence_refs.source_quote: B46 is the second busiest bus route in NYC
B46 local buses make all stops. B46 Limited-Stop buses operate 7 days a week.
